notes:
• “Do not cite” now actually blocks citation — the Cite button refuses internal/privileged exhibits (or warns and cites the rest)
• Ribbon buttons reflect the selected exhibit: Lock ⇄ Unlock, and Include / No cite light up when set
• Renamed “Used” → “Include” (clearer: mark an exhibit to include in the submission — it gets numbered and listed)
• Green seal marks included exhibits, a red ⊘ marks do-not-cite, in the list
